message:
fix(parser): ignore nested flowchart headers inside subgraphs

A flowchart header (e.g. `flowchart RL`) appearing inside a subgraph
block was silently overwriting the top-level graph direction, causing
the entire diagram to render with the wrong orientation.

When `stop_on_end` is true (i.e. we are inside a subgraph), the parser
now emits a warning and skips the direction update instead of applying
it to the parent flowchart.

Includes a regression test that verifies:
- The top-level TB direction is preserved.
- A diagnostic warning is produced for the nested header.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
